title: Digest — Mar 23, 2026, 11:57 PM UTC
summary:
# Pwarf Devlog

## Idle Dwarf Mechanics Overhaul

We’re excited to share an important update regarding the behavior of idle dwarves, which will help maintain their overall happiness and stability:

- **Increased purpose restoration:** The purpose restoration rate for idle dwarves has been increased from **0.02 to 0.04**. This adjustment matches the decay rate of purpose, preventing it from dropping to critical levels too quickly and avoiding potential tantrums.
- **New deconstruct pickup test:** We've added a new test to ensure that deconstruction pickups operate correctly, further enhancing gameplay consistency.

These changes are aimed at creating a more engaging experience for players as they manage their dwarven colonies!

## Merged PRs
- #559

## Sim Health Check

Baseline scenario: 3 dwarves, 500 ticks (10 days)

- **Dwarves alive:** 3 / 3
- **Tasks completed:** 0
- **Avg stress:** 0
- **Deaths:**
  - No deaths

prs.title: fix: idle purpose restore matches decay + deconstruct pickup test
